languages.text: "Вы были там, Лорд-капитан, я помню. {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_Painkiller}Забрали боль{/d}. Вы приказали установить... Хотели как лучше".

traits.locale_text: "Вы были там, Лорд-капитан, я помню. Забрали боль. Вы приказали установить... Хотели как лучше".

languages.text: "You were there, Lord Captain. I remember. You {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_Painkiller}took away the pain{/d}. You ordered them to install... You wanted to do what was best."
languages.original_text: "Вы были там, Лорд-капитан, я помню. {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_Painkiller}Забрали боль{/d}. Вы приказали установить... Хотели как лучше".

traits.locale_text: "You were there, Lord Captain. I remember. You {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_Painkiller}took away the pain{/d}. You ordered them to install... You wanted to do what was best."
"You were there, Lord Captain. I remember. You took away the pain. You ordered them to install... You wanted to do what was best."
"You were there, Lord Captain. I remember. You took away the pain. You ordered them to install... You wanted to do what was best."
"You were there, Lord Captain. I remember. You took away the pain. You ordered them to install... You wanted to do what was best."

languages.text: "Ihr wart dort, Lord Captain. Ich erinnere mich. Ihr {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_Painkiller}nahmt mir den Schmerz{/d}. Auf Euren Befehl installierten sie ... Ihr wolltet das Richtige tun."
languages.original_text: "You were there, Lord Captain. I remember. You {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_Painkiller}took away the pain{/d}. You ordered them to install... You wanted to do what was best."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr wart dort, Lord Captain. Ich erinnere mich. Ihr {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_Painkiller}nahmt mir den Schmerz{/d}. Auf Euren Befehl installierten sie ... Ihr wolltet das Richtige tun."

languages.text: « Vous étiez là, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Je m'en souviens. Vous avez {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_Painkiller}fait disparaître la douleur{/d}. Vous leur avez ordonné d'installer... Vous vouliez faire ce qu'il y avait de mieux. »
languages.original_text: "You were there, Lord Captain. I remember. You {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_Painkiller}took away the pain{/d}. You ordered them to install... You wanted to do what was best."

traits.locale_text: « Vous étiez là, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Je m'en souviens. Vous avez {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_Painkiller}fait disparaître la douleur{/d}. Vous leur avez ordonné d'installer... Vous vouliez faire ce qu'il y avait de mieux. »

languages.text: “您当时就在现场，舰长大人，我记得。您{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_Painkiller}带走了痛苦{/d}。您下令要他们为我安装植入物……您希望做出最正确的决定。”
languages.original_text: "You were there, Lord Captain. I remember. You {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_Painkiller}took away the pain{/d}. You ordered them to install... You wanted to do what was best."

traits.locale_text: “您当时就在现场，舰长大人，我记得。您{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_Painkiller}带走了痛苦{/d}。您下令要他们为我安装植入物……您希望做出最正确的决定。”

languages.text: «Estuvo allí, Lord Capitán. Lo recuerdo. Me {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_Painkiller}quitó el dolor{/d}. Ordenó que me instalaran... quiso hacer lo mejor para mí».
languages.original_text: "You were there, Lord Captain. I remember. You {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_Painkiller}took away the pain{/d}. You ordered them to install... You wanted to do what was best."

traits.locale_text: «Estuvo allí, Lord Capitán. Lo recuerdo. Me {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_Painkiller}quitó el dolor{/d}. Ordenó que me instalaran... quiso hacer lo mejor para mí».

languages.text: 「ロード・キャプテン、あなたはそこにいた。覚えています。あなたは{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_Painkiller}痛みを取り除いてくれた{/d}。あなたは彼らに取り付けを命じた…あなたは最善を尽くそうとしたんだ。」
languages.original_text: "You were there, Lord Captain. I remember. You {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_Painkiller}took away the pain{/d}. You ordered them to install... You wanted to do what was best."

traits.locale_text: 「ロード・キャプテン、あなたはそこにいた。覚えています。あなたは{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_Painkiller}痛みを取り除いてくれた{/d}。あなたは彼らに取り付けを命じた…あなたは最善を尽くそうとしたんだ。」

languages.text: "Sizi orada gördüm Lord Kaptan. Hatırlıyorum. {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_Painkiller}Acıyı çekip aldınız{/d}. Onlara takmalarını emrettiniz... En iyisini yapmak istediniz."
languages.original_text: "You were there, Lord Captain. I remember. You {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_Painkiller}took away the pain{/d}. You ordered them to install... You wanted to do what was best."

traits.locale_text: "Sizi orada gördüm Lord Kaptan. Hatırlıyorum. {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_Painkiller}Acıyı çekip aldınız{/d}. Onlara takmalarını emrettiniz... En iyisini yapmak istediniz."
